result.summary: sasportal.googleapis.com exposes one REST API surface, the SAS Portal API, authenticated with Google OAuth 2.0 bearer access tokens from either a user account or a service account; no GraphQL, MCP, or first-party CLI surface was found for this domain.
result.description: Google Spectrum Access System manages wireless communications for devices operating in the CBRS band and provides a SAS Portal for administering customers, deployments, devices, nodes, installers, and policies. The product is documented as deprecated and scheduled to continue operating until June 10, 2027 while customers migrate to other SAS solutions.

google_oauth_user.label: Google user OAuth access token
google_oauth_user.setup: Request access to the SAS Portal API first; Google states the API is available by invitation only and the support forum directs users to contact [sas-api-support@google.com](mailto:sas-api-support@google.com). After access is granted, create or use an OAuth client in the [Google Cloud Console](https://console.cloud.google.com/) and obtain a user access token with scope `https://www.googleapis.com/auth/userinfo.email` for a SAS Portal user account.
